name: Brooklyn Bridge Walking Tour
reason: Iconic walk with stunning views that provides natural conversation time and a shared NYC experience.

name: Escape Room Challenge
reason: Collaborative puzzle-solving that reveals team dynamics and communication styles in a fun, low-stakes environment.

name: Central Park Bike Tour
reason: Leisurely group ride through Central Park with stops at landmarks, perfect for casual team bonding.

name: Broadway Show
reason: Shared cultural experience that gives teams something to discuss over dinner afterward.

name: Pottery Workshop
venue: Color Me Mine, Upper West Side
reason: Hands-on creative activity that levels the playing field — everyone's a beginner, reducing hierarchy.

name: Rooftop Yoga Session
reason: Morning yoga with city views sets a mindful, focused tone for the day's work sessions.

name: Food Tour — Lower East Side
reason: Walking food tour through diverse neighborhoods creates shared culinary discoveries and conversation.

name: Improv Comedy Workshop
reason: Yes-and improv exercises build psychological safety, active listening, and spontaneous collaboration.

name: Bowling Night
reason: Casual competitive fun with lanes, food, and drinks — naturally mixes people across team boundaries.

name: High Line Walking Tour
venue: The High Line, Gansevoort Street entrance
reason: Elevated urban park walk with art installations that spark creative discussion in a relaxed setting.
